Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the 'Sign in' button
Then the user should be navigated to the login screen and prompted to enter their credentials

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the 'Search' bar and enters a destination
Then the app should display a list of suggested locations matching the search term

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the 'Notifications' bell icon
Then the user should be navigated to the Notifications screen and see a list of notifications

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user scrolls down
Then the app should load and display more recommended properties

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps on a property card
Then the user should be navigated to the property details screen for that property

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the 'My Account' tab in the bottom navigation
Then the user should be navigated to the My Account screen

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user taps the 'Sign in' button
Then the user should see the login form to enter their email and password

Given the user is on the My Account screen and signed in
When the user taps the 'My Bookings' option
Then the user should be navigated to the Bookings screen and see a list of their upcoming and past bookings

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user taps the 'Settings' icon
Then the user should be navigated to the Settings screen

Given the user is on the Bookings screen
When the user taps on a booking item
Then the user should be navigated to the booking details screen for that reservation

Given the user is on the Bookings screen
When the user has no bookings
Then the app should display a message indicating there are no bookings yet

Given the user is on the Notifications screen
When the user receives a new notification
Then the notification should appear at the top of the notifications list

Given the user is on the Notifications screen
When the user taps on a notification
Then the user should be navigated to the relevant screen or see more details about the notification

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the 'Filter' icon
Then the app should display filter options for the property search

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the 'Dates' field
Then the app should display a date picker to select check-in and check-out dates

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the 'Guests' field
Then the app should display a guest selector to choose the number of guests

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user completes a search with destination, dates, and guests
Then the app should display a list of available properties matching the search criteria

Given the user is on the property details screen
When the user taps the 'Book now' button
Then the app should navigate to the booking flow for that property

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the 'Language' or 'Currency' selector
Then the app should display options to change the language or currency

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user pulls down to refresh the content
Then the app should reload and display the latest recommended properties
